{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":200},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496126678683599641","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看(๑• . •๑)，一本一口气看完的美食小说。紧凑不推塔，精彩不断，美食不断。感谢作者辛苦写作。带来美各种美食，各种正能量。[赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745330907,"group_id":"7240699515588578344","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzNGfH+So5albmUHIjv3coCNz6fqTOh1rWIgiw4UWslI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1860028470668445","user_name":"爱吃白菜烧瓜的赵东升"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1860028470668445","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1701525971,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7240699515588578344","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统、美食、轻松搞笑、都市日常、单女主、生活向慢节奏】失业之后的王平安，回到陌生又熟悉的小县城，从此开启摆摊创业的生活。依靠自身的厨艺加上系统的加持，荣获“大锅王”和“禽兽克星”等称号……
